props.name: active
props.description: Toggle the active state for the component.

props.name: ariaRemoveLabel
props.description: Provides an accessible label for the remove button.

props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: clickable
props.description: Enables interactive hover styling and pointer cursor.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI's themed colors.

props.name: disabled
props.description:
Toggle the disabled state for the component.

Defaults to `undefined` so a chip can override the value inherited from a `CChipSet` (including turning it off).

props.name: filter
props.description:
Turns the component into a filter chip. A filter chip is selectable and shows a leading check icon while selected.

Defaults to `undefined` so a chip can override the value inherited from a `CChipSet`.

props.name: removable
props.description:
Displays a remove button inside the component.

Defaults to `undefined` so a chip can override the value inherited from a `CChipSet` (including turning it off).

props.name: removeIcon
props.description: Replaces the default remove icon with a custom icon node.

props.name: selectable
props.description:
Enables selectable behavior and keyboard toggle support.

Defaults to `undefined` so a chip can override the value inherited from a `CChipSet`.

props.name: selected
props.description: Controls the selected state of a selectable component.

props.name: selectedIcon
props.description: Replaces the default selected icon shown by a filter chip with a custom icon node.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small or large.

props.name: value
props.description: Sets the value associated with the component, used by `CChipSet` to track selection.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the button variant to an outlined style.

events.name: click
events.description: Event called when the user clicks on the component.

events.name: deselect
events.description: Event called when the component becomes deselected.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Event called when the user presses a key.

events.name: remove
events.description: Event called when the component requests removal.

events.name: select
events.description: Event called when the component becomes selected.

events.name: selected-change
events.description: Event called when the selected state changes.
